name: pde
description: JSM alert management (pde-jsm MCP server) and the resolve-duplicate-contact-alerts skill.

ATLASSIAN_EMAIL.title: Atlassian email
ATLASSIAN_EMAIL.description: Email address for Atlassian/JSM API authentication.

EMAIL_USERNAME.title: Email username (optional)
EMAIL_USERNAME.description: IMAP account used by find_emails. Only needed for email search.

EMAIL_PASSWORD.title: Email app password (optional)
EMAIL_PASSWORD.description: IMAP app password (not your account password) for the email above.
